panels.title: Verdict

targets.rawSql: WITH lv AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project) project, quarter, lvl_a, lvl_b, lvl_c, lvl_d, lvl_e, overall FROM reporting.v_levels ORDER BY project, quarter DESC), agg AS (SELECT min(lvl_c) mc, min(lvl_e) me, min(overall) mo, count(*) n FROM lv) SELECT CASE WHEN me <= 1 OR mc <= 1 THEN '🔴 A gate is red (governance/quality at L1) — stabilise before scaling AI.' WHEN mo >= 3 THEN '🟢 Portfolio maturing — median discipline holds; keep investing.' ELSE '🟡 Building the baseline — measurement in place, levels still forming.' END AS verdict FROM agg

panels.description: One-line conclusion generated from reporting.v_levels: red if any project's C-Quality or E-Governance gate is at L1, green if every project is L3+, amber while the baseline forms.

panels.title: Projects Tracked

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT project) FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE period_type = 'sprint'

panels.description: Distinct projects with at least one collected sprint.

panels.title: AI Net $ (portfolio, latest month)

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(w.ai_time_saved_h * CASE w.project WHEN 'Future' THEN 12 WHEN 'TeacherZone' THEN 12 ELSE 0 END) - sum(COALESCE(t.value::numeric, 0)) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project) * FROM reporting.metrics_wide WHERE period_type = 'month' AND ai_time_saved_h IS NOT NULL ORDER BY project, period_key DESC) w LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs t ON t.project = w.project AND t.period_key = w.period_key AND t.field = 'ai_tool_cost_monthly'

panels.description: Sum across projects of (AI hours saved × that project's blended rate) − monthly AI tool cost. Green when net-positive.

panels.title: AI PR % (portfolio)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(ai_pr_pct), 1) FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint')

panels.description: Average AI-labeled PR share across projects, latest sprint each.

panels.title: Lead Time (portfolio)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(lead_time_h), 1) FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint')

panels.description: Average lead time across projects (latest sprint each). Lower is faster delivery.

panels.title: Agent Autonomy (portfolio)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(autonomy_pct), 1) FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint')

panels.description: Average share of agent PRs merged with zero human commits, across projects. Blue marks maturity level, not health.

panels.title: Cost Improvement (portfolio)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(100 * (b.v - a.v) / NULLIF(b.v, 0)), 0) FROM (SELECT project, period_key, value::numeric v FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_baseline') b JOIN (SELECT project, period_key, value::numeric v FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_actual') a USING (project, period_key) JOIN (SELECT project, max(period_key) mk FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_actual' GROUP BY project) m ON m.project = b.project AND m.mk = b.period_key

panels.description: Baseline vs actual cost per unit (latest manual input per project). Empty until cost_baseline/cost_actual are entered.

panels.title: Project Scorecard — Latest Sprint (A·B·C·D, mirrors Excel)
A. Adoption — Latest Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", period_key AS "Sprint", total_tasks AS "Tasks", total_prs AS "PRs", round(ai_pr_pct, 1) AS "AI PR %", round(agent_task_pct, 1) AS "Agent Task %", round(usage_pct, 0) AS "Usage %", round(ai_task_pct, 1) AS "AI Task %", round(throughput_per_engineer, 1) AS "Throughput/Eng" FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint') ORDER BY project

panels.description: How broadly AI is used — PR share, agent task share, engineer usage rate (target ≥80%), and throughput per engineer.

panels.title: B. Delivery (DORA) — Latest Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", period_key AS "Sprint", round(lead_time_h, 1) AS "Lead Time h", round(deploys_per_week, 2) AS "Deploys/wk", round(cfr_pct, 1) AS "CFR %", round(mttr_h, 1) AS "MTTR h", round(predictability_pct, 0) AS "Predictability %" FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint') ORDER BY project

panels.description: DORA throughput + stability plus sprint predictability. Green = on target, yellow = watch, red = act.

panels.title: C. Quality — Latest Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", period_key AS "Sprint", round(ai_pr_review_pct, 1) AS "Review %", round(rework_pct, 1) AS "Rework %", round(ai_pr_test_pct, 1) AS "AI PR Test %", round(rework_from_ai_pct, 1) AS "Rework from AI %", security_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint') ORDER BY project

panels.description: Verification quality — human review coverage, rework rate, AI PRs touching tests, share of rework traced to AI PRs, and open security alerts.

panels.title: D. Agent — Latest Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", period_key AS "Sprint", round(agent_pr_pct, 1) AS "Agent PR %", round(autonomy_pct, 1) AS "Autonomy %", round(agent_completion_pct, 1) AS "Completion %", round(human_intervention_pct, 1) AS "Human-fix %", round(agent_cycle_h, 1) AS "Agent Cycle h" FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint') ORDER BY project

panels.description: Agent maturity — agent PR share, autonomy (merged with zero human commits), completion vs human-fix rate, and cycle time.

panels.title: Evidence — AI vs non-AI (latest sprint)

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", round(lead_time_ai_h, 1) AS "Lead AI h", round(lead_time_nonai_h, 1) AS "Lead non-AI h", round(100 * (lead_time_nonai_h - lead_time_ai_h) / NULLIF(lead_time_nonai_h, 0), 0) AS "Lead Δ%", round(pr_size_ai, 0) AS "PR size AI", round(pr_size_nonai, 0) AS "PR size non-AI", n_ai_pr AS "n(AI PR)" FROM reporting.v_metrics r WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start = (SELECT max(period_start) FROM reporting.v_metrics r2 WHERE r2.project = r.project AND r2.period_type = 'sprint') ORDER BY project

panels.description: AI vs non-AI, as pre-computed deltas with sample size. A slower AI lead time is a legitimate finding (verification overhead), not an error — read it with the quality columns. n(AI PR) is the sample behind the AI figures.

panels.title: Portfolio Maturity — A–E Heatmap

targets.rawSql: SELECT project AS "Project", lvl_a AS "A", lvl_b AS "B", lvl_c AS "C ★", lvl_d AS "D", lvl_e AS "E ★", overall AS "OVERALL" FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project) project, quarter, lvl_a, lvl_b, lvl_c, lvl_d, lvl_e, overall FROM reporting.v_levels ORDER BY project, quarter DESC) x ORDER BY overall, project

panels.description: Each project's A-E levels for its latest quarter. C and E are gates (★). Click a project to open its dashboard. OVERALL = MIN(E, C, round(avg)).

panels.title: AI PR % by Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, project, ai_pr_pct FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: AI-labeled PR share per sprint, one line per project. Adoption trajectory across the portfolio.

panels.title: Lead Time by Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, project, lead_time_h FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Lead time (hours) per sprint, one line per project. Lower/flatter is better.

panels.title: Agent Autonomy % by Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, project, autonomy_pct FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Share of agent PRs merged with no human commits, per sprint and project. Rising = growing agent autonomy.

panels.title: Cost Improvement % by Project (latest)

targets.rawSql: SELECT b.project AS "Project", round(100 * (b.v - a.v) / NULLIF(b.v, 0), 0) AS "Cost Improvement %" FROM (SELECT project, period_key, value::numeric v FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_baseline') b JOIN (SELECT project, period_key, value::numeric v FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_actual') a USING (project, period_key) JOIN (SELECT project, max(period_key) mk FROM reporting.manual_inputs WHERE field = 'cost_actual' GROUP BY project) m ON m.project = b.project AND m.mk = b.period_key ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.description: From monthly manual inputs (cost baseline vs actual per unit).

panels.title: Engineer Usage Rate by Project (latest month)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (w.project) w.project AS "Project", round(w.usage_pct, 0) AS "Usage %" FROM reporting.v_metrics w WHERE w.period_type = 'month' ORDER BY w.project, w.period_key DESC

panels.description: AI engineers ÷ team size (manual input, falls back to active PR contributors). Framework target ≥80%.

panels.title: AI Tasks by Tool (portfolio, all sprints)

targets.rawSql: SELECT replace(metric_key, 'ai_tasks_tool_', '') AS "Tool", sum(value) AS "Tasks" FROM reporting.metric_counts WHERE period_type = 'sprint' AND metric_key LIKE 'ai_tasks_tool_%' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.description: Portfolio tool mix — informs license decisions.

panels.title: ASK — decisions for the board this quarter

options.content:
### Requested decisions
- (update each quarter) Approve/defer expanding AI to project X
- (update) Renew/adjust tool licences per the tool-mix panel
- (update) Fund the governance gap flagged in the heatmap

panels.description: Board decisions requested this quarter. Edit per meeting.
